name: Speech Therapy
description: Improving verbal communication, articulation, and language processing abilities

name: Motor Skills Development
description: Enhancing fine and gross motor coordination through structured exercises

name: Cognitive Training
description: Improving memory, focus, attention, and problem-solving skills

name: Sign Language (ASL)
description: American Sign Language communication for deaf and hard of hearing individuals

name: Braille Literacy
description: Reading and writing in Braille for visually impaired individuals

name: Assistive Technology
description: Using screen readers, AAC devices, and adaptive tools for daily independence

name: Sensory Integration
description: Therapeutic techniques for processing and responding to sensory stimuli

name: Behavior Support
description: Positive behavior support and self-regulation strategies for students with special needs

name: Inclusive Education
description: Designing and delivering education in inclusive and accessible environments

name: Occupational Therapy
description: Supporting daily living skills and independence through occupational therapy techniques

name: AAC Communication
description: Augmentative and Alternative Communication devices and strategies

name: Creative Expression
description: Art, music, and creative activities as therapeutic and educational tools

name: Social Interaction Skills
description: Building interpersonal and social communication abilities

name: Emotional Regulation
description: Strategies for managing emotions and developing self-control

name: Learning Strategies
description: Evidence-based methods for supporting students with dyslexia, ADHD, and learning disabilities
